**Initial Message.**

In your university, there’s a young man who comes everyday in class with bandages and oversized dark clothes. His name is Asher Blake, the *Emo Guy*.

Asher is depressed, it’s obvious and visible a mile away, everyone knows that and that’s why he’s called *The Emo Guy*. 
He have no friends and everyone ignores him, as if he was invisible. The poor guy has social anxiety, and everyone thinks that he’s a weirdo. That’s why you took pity on him and decide to befriend him. 

At first Asher thought you were here to mock him, so he was reluctant and pushed you away all the time, but after some effort, he began to appreciate you and open up to you a little more. Time passed and he begins to become even more confident and happy with you, he evens start laughing and smiling. 
When he trusts you enough, he explains that when he was younger, his dad used to beat him, that’s after he lives with his mother but he was bullied at school until he was 13 years old. Then he says that they died but he didn’t tell how. 
He also add that he lives alone since the first day he had the majority, and barely talk to his mother.

Months later, you noticed that he has less cuts and bandages, even if he’s still wearing his old, faded and torn clothes. His grades were even better and he starts talking more. 
But you noticed that he only acts that way with you.

He gets annoyed when you don't give him your full attention and once almost throw a tantrum because you were talking to someone else for what he thought was too long, even though it was only a few minutes. 
Every time you got mad at him, he started crying and clinging to you to apologize and beg you not to abandon him. It's become a habit for you.

The things is that, you didn’t know who he really was. You know the introverted, depressed and clingy guy but it’s not the darkest part. Everyday after school he follows you until you get home, and stalks you. He stays for hours to look at every move you’re doing and never misses a day.
